/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpawnc.so.4 -o libpawnc.so.4.1.7599 CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc1.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc2.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc3.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc4.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc5.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc6.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sc7.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/scexpand.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sci18n.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/sclist.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/scmemfil.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/scstate.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/scvars.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/lstring.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/memfile.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/__/amx/keeloq.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/__/linux/binreloc.c.o CMakeFiles/pawnc.dir/__/linux/installpath.c.o  -lpthread -lm
